title: Account Creation UI — Currency Picker (AccountManageScreen)
description: Add a mandatory currency selector to the Add Account form. Display the currency as a read-only chip on the Edit Account screen. Integrate with AccountManageViewModel.
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-118' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-118' to ingest requirements
Define a hardcoded list of supported currencies in a companion object or constants file: [EUR, USD, SEK, GBP, CHF, JPY, CAD, AUD, NOK, DKK, PLN]
Add `selectedCurrency: String` state to AccountManageViewModel; validate it is non-empty before allowing save
In AccountManageScreen Add Account form: add an ExposedDropdownMenuBox showing the currency list
Save button is disabled / shows error if currency not selected
In AccountManageScreen Edit Account view: show currency as a read-only Text or Chip (not editable)
Wire selected currency into CreateAccountUseCase call (already accepts Account which has currency)
Add `@trace TASK-118` to AccountManageScreen.kt and AccountManageViewModel.kt
Update SettingsViewModelTest or create AccountManageViewModelTest to verify: empty currency blocks save; valid currency passes through
definition_of_done: Currency dropdown appears in Add Account form with the supported currency list
Attempting to save without a currency selection is blocked (button disabled or validation error)
Currency is shown as read-only in Edit Account view
Unit test confirms ViewModel rejects empty currency
